title: Notifications -  Low Battery OFF
scenario: Verify that disabling the "Low Battery" notification in Poly Lens settings prevents the "Device has a low battery" alert from appearing when pairing a device with less than 5% battery, turning it off, backgrounding the app, and turning it back on.
steps: 2. Navigate to General > Notifications & Device Alerts.
4. Pair a device with low battery (below 5%).
6. Put the app in the background.
expected: The "Device has a low battery" notification should NOT appear.
